name: NP Life Sciences Health Industry Group Inc.
summary: PART I . OUR COMPANY NP Life Sciences Health Industry Group Inc. (NP Life Sciences, NPLS, the Company, we, us or our), formerly GJ Culture Group US, Inc, was formed as a Nevada corporation on December 20, 2018 for the purpose of providing educational and other related services based on classical Chinese studies and culture. We aim to serve as a cultural and educational meeting point between China and the U.S. We are an emerging company and is qualified and authorized to transact intestate busine...
